hooks.command: if [ -x bin/rails ]; then bin/rails test >/dev/null 2>&1; rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"bin/rails test failed. Fix failing tests before committing."}'; fi; fi

if [ -x bin/rubocop ]; then bin/rubocop --format quiet >/dev/null 2>&1; rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Rubocop violations found. Run bin/rubocop to see details."}'; fi; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.rb ]] && [ -x bin/rubocop ]; then bin/rubocop "$f" 2>&1; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
